project.name: Medical Document Intelligence & Tracker
project.vision: Build a multi-user medical record intelligence system that ingests prescriptions, lab reports, and medical documents, extracts structured medical knowledge, and enables a retrieval-based AI assistant with strict grounding in user-provided documents.

core_objectives.objective: Digitize and organize all medical documents (prescriptions, test reports, diagnoses, discharge summaries).
Extract structured medical entities: symptoms, diseases, medications, tests, results, and doctor information.
Enable longitudinal tracking per patient and per disease.
Provide a strict RAG-based chatbot that only answers from uploaded documents with citations.
Keep raw files stored locally; database stores only extracted structured metadata.

input_sources.source: Image uploads (prescriptions, handwritten notes, lab reports)

processing_steps.step: OCR extraction for images and scanned PDFs
Document classification (prescription, lab report, diagnostic report, discharge summary)
Entity extraction: diseases, symptoms, medications, tests, results, doctor names
Linking extracted entities to document metadata

patient_profile.fields: id, name, age, gender, relationships (father, mother, sibling, etc.)

storage_constraints.rule: Raw files (images/PDFs) MUST be stored locally on disk.
Database stores only metadata, extracted entities, embeddings, and references to local file paths.

organization_layer.requirement: Group all medical data per patient.
Timeline view of medical history (chronological ordering).
Link tests, prescriptions, and reports across time.

design_principles.principle: Fast navigation between patients, diseases, and documents

screen.name: Home Dashboard
screen.components: Patient selector cards Recent uploads timeline Quick upload button

screen.name: Patient Profile
screen.components: Disease sections (accordion style) Timeline of all documents Summary cards (medications, active conditions)

screen.name: Document Viewer
screen.components: Original file viewer (PDF/Image) Extracted structured data panel Linked entities (tests, medicines, doctor)

screen.name: Search & Ask
screen.components: Chat interface (RAG-powered) Source citations per answer Filter by patient / disease / date

screen.name: Edit / Human-in-the-loop
screen.components: Editable extracted entities Correction interface for OCR mistakes Manual tagging and validation tools

requirements.requirement: System must ONLY answer using uploaded documents.
Every response must include citations to source documents and sections.
If information is missing, explicitly say "not found in provided documents".

architecture.pipeline: 1. Chunk documents into semantically meaningful sections 2. Generate embeddings per chunk 3. Store embeddings in vector database 4. Retrieve top-k relevant chunks per query 5. Rerank results for precision 6. Generate response strictly grounded in retrieved chunks

ai_agent_rag_system.features: Multi-document reasoning across reports Cross-patient isolation (no data leakage between profiles) Citation-based answers (document + page reference)

multi_user_support.requirement: Support multiple patient profiles in a single system.
Family grouping view (father, mother, siblings, etc.).

non_functional_requirements.performance: Fast retrieval for chatbot responses (<2-3 seconds target)
non_functional_requirements.privacy: All sensitive medical data stored locally unless explicitly exported
non_functional_requirements.scalability: Support growing document volume over years

human_in_loop.capabilities: Edit extracted entities Correct OCR errors Merge duplicate medical entities Validate AI-generated classifications
